hooks.command: jq -rn '{systemMessage: "Superpowers integration active. If `/plugin list` does not show superpowers, run `/plugin install superpowers@claude-plugins-official`. Reminder: always ask the user before invoking any skill."}'

jq -rn '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "ask", permissionDecisionReason: "Ask the user for explicit approval before invoking this skill. The user wants to confirm every skill use."}}'
